title: 在服务端用 Pion + FFmpeg + RNN 做 WebRTC 通话降噪，值得吗？
content: An experiment tested server-side WebRTC noise reduction using Pion, FFmpeg, and RNN. Audio received via Pion's OnTrack was decoded from Opus RTP to PCM, then processed through FFmpeg's arnndn filter. Key findings: the pipeline suits offline validation, not real-time forwarding; int16 PCM requires proper s16le format mapping. Core challenges include latency, CPU usage, buffering, FFmpeg process management, packet loss, and audio-video synchronization. Server-side noise reduction can supplement weak client-side 3A processing but incurs real costs.

title: 9.5万大学生和37万高中生的使用数据，暴露了AI 时代真正的分水岭 | 原文
content: Two major studies in May 2026 revealed AI's divergent effects on education. UC Berkeley researchers analyzing 95,513 undergraduates found students use generative AI more for busywork than learning, with disadvantaged students relying on it more and benefiting less. Georgetown University researchers examining 370,000 college application essays discovered AI use correlated with weaker critical thinking indicators, though advantaged students maintained stronger personal engagement. Both studies indicate AI amplifies existing inequalities rather than democratizing education.

title: AI 编程时代， MVP 思维已经失效了？
content: The author argues that MVP thinking is outdated in AI-assisted coding. Traditional MVP relied on cheap prototyping, but AI makes quality and quick implementations equally fast. However, AI-generated code creates invisible technical debt: understanding debt (unexplainable code), homogeneity debt (generic solutions), and ownership debt (developers become curators, not authors). Building Agent OS in Rust, the author chose direct, well-understood architecture over quick prototypes. True speed comes from comprehension—being able to modify and debug code, not just generate it.

title: 马斯克「夸下的海口」，值2万亿美元吗？
content: SpaceX filed an S-1 prospectus in May 2026 seeking $75 billion in an IPO that would become the world's largest. The company frames itself as a "physical world operating system" linking rockets, satellite internet, energy, AI, and robotics. Its $2 trillion valuation relies heavily on Starlink—the only profitable unit with $11.4 billion in 2025 revenue—while rocket launches lose money and AI burns cash rapidly. The company leases idle GPU capacity to rivals for survival. Heavy losses, a new Nasdaq rule benefiting low-float giants, extreme insider control with 42% ownership and 85% voting power, and extensive related-party transactions pose significant risks.

title: 从40家缩到4家，“大食代”输给了大时代
content: Singaporean Guo Mingzhong opened the first Food Republic in Shanghai in 1997, pioneering the food court concept for China's emerging white-collar class. The model thrived for two decades, expanding to over 40 locations by 2016. However, the brand faced irreversible decline from 2012-2015 due to three converging pressures: standardized fast-food chains offering better reliability, delivery platforms eliminating the need for physical food courts, and declining mall traffic from e-commerce competition. By June 2026, Food Republic will close its final Beijing store after 26 years, leaving only about four Shanghai locations. The brand's fall illustrates how business models built on "scene premiums" rather than product competitiveness become vulnerable when consumer priorities shift toward efficiency and value.

Mac mini卖断货，「断头」MacBook成了AI新宠？
content: Headless MacBooks—MacBooks with broken screens that are sold without displays—are resurging in China as AI tools gain popularity. This trend is driven by Mac mini M4 shortages and price hikes in 2026, caused by storage cost increases and surging demand for "lobster farming" (running AI agents like OpenClaw). A headless MacBook Pro M1 Pro with 16GB RAM and 512GB storage costs around ¥3,200, significantly less than a scarce Mac mini M4 equivalent. These devices appeal to AI enthusiasts because screenless operation suits remote server use. However, risks include unknown device history, potential defects, and no warranty. Alternatives include Windows/Linux mini PCs or cloud-based AI solutions, which offer greater flexibility and reduced hardware investment. Security concerns persist regarding unsupervised local AI deployment.

title: “车”、“油”、“死猪”：全球性的迷奸网络和对迷药来源的探寻(2) | 原文
content: A Chinese-language investigation by STRG_F uncovered a global drug-facilitated sexual assault network operating in Germany. One perpetrator, Zhang Dapeng, was arrested in 2024 after Frankfurt police traced him via Chinese social media platforms Xiaohongshu and WeChat, using DNA evidence from a victim who briefly regained consciousness and tried to photograph him. The case connects to broader patterns of such crimes, paralleling the high-profile Dominique Pelicot case in France where a man drugged his wife and invited strangers to assault her through the website coco.fr.

title: “车”、“油”、“死猪”：全球性的迷奸网络和对迷药来源的探寻(1) | 原文
content: An investigation into a global online network that facilitates sexual assault using date-rape drugs. The network operates through encrypted platforms like Telegram, where members use coded language—"car" for victims, "oil" for drugs—to coordinate crimes. What began as isolated incidents by individuals with access to sedatives has evolved into a profitable gray industry spanning multiple countries. After reporting on related cases in March and April 2025, including that of a UK-based PhD student, journalists uncovered larger organized groups exploiting these hidden communication channels.

title: 王小川和李开复，领着六小虎“AI的迫降”
content: China's top AI startups, once racing to build large language models, are pivoting to survival-focused strategies. 01.AI, led by Kai-Fu Lee, abandoned pre-training, cut costs dramatically, and shifted to enterprise services, achieving $200 million in orders by 2026 with low burn rates. Baichuan, led by Wang Xiaochuan, refocused entirely on healthcare AI, launching medical models with industry-leading accuracy. Meanwhile, Zhipu and MiniMax went public with billion-dollar valuations but remain heavily unprofitable, while Moonshot and Step continue burning capital on base model research. The shift marks the end of China's "model war" era, as startups concede they cannot match U.S. tech giants' $725+ billion annual AI spending.

title: 上海大模型龙头，启动A股上市
content: Shanghai-based AI large model company MiniMax has submitted an A-share IPO filing, competing with Zhipu to become the first large model stock in China's A-share market. The company completed its Hong Kong IPO in January 2026, with its stock price surging 409% from the listing price to 840 HKD, reaching a market cap of 263.4 billion HKD. MiniMax's annual recurring revenue has exceeded $300 million after growing over 100% in two months, though it reported an adjusted net loss of $250 million for 2025. The company serves over 3 million enterprise and developer clients globally with approximately 300 million users. It has released three flagship language models this year and plans to launch the MiniMax-M3 model featuring significantly improved inference speeds through its Sparse Attention mechanism. Other major domestic large model companies including Moonshot AI, Stepfun, and 01.AI are also reportedly planning Hong Kong IPO

title: 苹果 iOS 27 爆料：用 Gemini 训练本地 AI，部分 Siri 请求转向谷歌云
content: Apple prioritizes privacy in AI deployment by focusing on on-device processing, distilling Google's Gemini to train lightweight local models. For iOS 27, some Siri requests will shift to Google Cloud using an authorized Gemini version, as Apple's Private Cloud Compute cannot handle full Gemini's computational demands. To protect privacy, Apple approved NVIDIA's confidential computing technology, which will slightly slow cloud AI queries but enhance sensitive data protection. The company may ultimately rely on both Google Cloud and NVIDIA AI chips.

The incident highlights how tech firms' push to encourage AI adoption can backfire through gamification abuse, with Meta employees previously engaging in similar token-inflating behavior.

title: 人生顶级玩家的进化论：对在意的东西极度狂热，对失败的结果异常淡然
content: People aged 20–35 often cycle between motivation and relapse because change threatens their psychological identity. The brain treats challenges to one's self-concept as survival threats, triggering defensive reactions that sabotage goals. To escape this pattern, one needs a compelling reason to change, brutal honesty about one's undesirable trajectory, rapid environmental changes that immerse the mind in a new identity, and practiced distance between impulse and action through meditation and observation. The ultimate goal is becoming someone who pursues goals with intense passion yet remains unusually detached from outcomes—fearing mediocrity enough to work hard, but staying unshaken by setbacks.

title: Comprehensive observability for Amazon SageMaker AI LLM inference: From GPU utilization to LLM quality
content: Comprehensive observability for Amazon SageMaker AI LLM inference requires monitoring two dimensions: infrastructure "quantity" and model "quality." Quantity metrics track GPU utilization, latency, throughput, and cost per inference component, using SageMaker enhanced metrics in CloudWatch. Quality metrics evaluate response accuracy, safety, and consistency via custom scores published to a separate CloudWatch namespace. Amazon Managed Grafana visualizes both dimensions in unified dashboards, with threshold-based alerts via SNS for automated triage. This approach detects operational bottlenecks alongside silent model degradation, enabling correlated optimization of cost, performance, and output quality across multi-model endpoints.

title: 现在不能说赚到钱
content: Large funds exit positions gradually by inflating stocks far above target prices before selling during perceived "bargain" dips, conditioning retail investors to ignore warning signs through repeated recoveries until a true crash occurs. Tech stocks mirror US trends, but most will decline while a few survive. Index fund popularity will likely sour after this cycle. Until profits are realized through actual selling, gains remain illusory—many who earned 100% returns earlier now retain only 30%.
